sqlMap.select: SELECT defaultview, startday, starttime, endtime, autodelete FROM TBL_SCHEDULECONFIG WHERE userid = #v_USERID# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT DISTINCT A.groupid as groupid, groupname, '' as description, '' as createdate FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUP A LEFT JOIN TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER B ON A.GroupID = B.GroupID AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE (creatorid = #v_USERID# OR ( memberid = #v_USERID# AND status = 1 )) AND A.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY GroupName

SELECT SCHEDULEID, PARENTID, OWNERID, OWNERNAME, OWNERNAME2, (A.CREATEDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS CREATEDATE, TBLSCHEDULE.CREATORNAME, TBLSCHEDULE.CREATORNAME2, TBLSCHEDULE.CREATEDATE, MODIFIERID, MODIFIERNAME, MODIFIERNAME2, (A.MODIFYDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS MODIFYDATE, SCHEDULETYPE, IMPORTANCE, HASATTENDANT, HASATTACH, HASCOMMENT, ISREADONLY, ISPUBLIC, DATETYPE, (A.STARTDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS STARTDATE, (A.ENDDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS ENDDATE, REPETITION, REPETITIONDELETE, TITLE, LOCATION, CONTENTPATH, GROUPNAME FROM TBL_SCHEDULE A LEFT JOIN TBL_SCHEDULEGROUP B ON A.OWNERID = B.GROUPID WHERE A.SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT SCHEDULEID, PARENTID, OWNERID, OWNERNAME, OWNERNAME2, CREATORID, CREATORNAME, CREATORNAME2, (CREATEDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS CREATEDATE, MODIFIERID, MODIFIERNAME, MODIFIERNAME2, (MODIFYDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS MODIFYDATE, SCHEDULETYPE, IMPORTANCE, HASATTENDANT, HASATTACH, HASCOMMENT, ISREADONLY, ISPUBLIC, DATETYPE, (STARTDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS STARTDATE, (ENDDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS ENDDATE, REPETITION, REPETITIONDELETE, TITLE, LOCATION, CONTENTPATH, '' AS GROUPNAME FROM TBL_SCHEDULE WHERE OWNERID IN ($v_PIDLIST$) AND ( (STARTDATE >= ''|| TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ||'' AND STARTDATE <= ''|| TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ||'' ) OR (ENDDATE >= ''|| TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ||'' AND ENDDATE < ''|| TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ||'') OR (STARTDATE < ''|| TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ||'' AND ENDDATE >= ''|| TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ||'' ) OR (DATETYPE='3') ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
$v_PFILTER$ LIKE '%'||#v_PKEYWORD#||'%' ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC
SELECT groupid, groupname, description, createdate FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUP WHERE creatorid = #v_USERID# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY GroupName

SELECT count(*) FROM ( SELECT memberid FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER WHERE groupid = #v_GROUPID# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# )A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.MemberID = B.CN WHERE B.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT A.memberid, '' as membername, '' as membername2, '' as status, '' as responsedate, B.mail, CASE #v_LANG# WHEN '1' THEN B.displayname || '(' || description || ')' WHEN '2' THEN B.displayname2 || '(' || description2 || ')' END info FROM ( SELECT memberid FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER WHERE groupid = #v_GROUPID# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# )A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.MemberID = B.CN WHERE B.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT memberid, membername, membername2, status, (responsedate + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) as responsedate, '' as mail, '' as info FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER WHERE groupid = #v_GROUPID# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT CN, CASE #v_LANG# WHEN '1' THEN displayname WHEN '2' THEN displayname2 END displayname, displayname2, CASE #v_LANG# WHEN '1' THEN description WHEN '2' THEN description2 END description, description2, title , title2 , telephonenumber FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE
department IN ( SELECT cn FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE dept_cd_path LIKE '%'||#v_DEPTID#||'%' )
department = #v_DEPTID#
ORDER BY description
SELECT LUNARUSE FROM TBL_LUNARUSE WHERE USECOMPANY = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT PREVIOSLYREGIUSE FROM TBL_PREVIOSLYREGI WHERE USECOMPANY = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT SECRETARYID , SECRETARYNAME FROM TBL_SECRETARY WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY SECRETARYNAME

SELECT A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 AS HQID, B.DISPLAYNAME AS HQNAME, B.DISPLAYNAME2 AS HQNAME2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.CN = #v_CN# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT USERID AS SECRETARYID, CASE #v_LANG# WHEN '1' THEN USERNAME WHEN '2' THEN USERNAME2 END SECRETARYNAME FROM TBL_SECRETARY WHERE SECRETARYID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT DEPARTMENTCN AS DEPTID, CASE #v_LANG# WHEN '1' THEN DEPARTMENTNAME WHEN '2' THEN DEPARTMENTNAME2 END DEPTNAME FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_PUBLIC_DEPT WHERE USERCN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT DEPTID, CASE #v_LANG# WHEN '1' THEN B.DISPLAYNAME WHEN '2' THEN B.DISPLAYNAME2 END TITLE FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON A.DEPTID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.CN = #v_CN# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT COUNT(ATTENDANTID) FROM TBL_ATTENDANT WHERE ATTENDANTID = #v_USERID# AND ( STATUS = 0 OR STATUS = 3 ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT COUNT(A.GROUPID) FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUP A JOIN TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER B ON A.GROUPID = B.GROUPID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE MEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND ( STATUS = 0 OR STATUS = 3 ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT ATTENDANTID, ATTENDANTNAME, ATTENDANTNAME2, ATTENDANTDEPTNAME, ATTENDANTDEPTNAME2, STATUS, RESPONSEDATE FROM TBL_ATTENDANT WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY ATTENDANTNAME
SELECT ATTACHID, FILESIZE, FILENAME, FILEPATH FROM TBL_SCHEDULEATTACH WHERE SCHEDULEID = #V_SCHEDULEID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT HOLIDAYID, HOLIDAYNAME, HOLIDAYNAME2, HOLIDAYDATE, NVL(ISSOLAR, '0') ISSOLAR, NVL(ISREPEAT, '0') ISREPEAT, NVL(ISUSE, '0') ISUSE, NVL(ISREST, '0') ISREST, USECOMPANY FROM TBL_HOLIDAYLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT HOLIDAYID, HOLIDAYNAME, HOLIDAYNAME2, HOLIDAYDATE, NVL(ISSOLAR, '0') ISSOLAR, NVL(ISREPEAT, '0') ISREPEAT, NVL(ISUSE, '0') ISUSE, NVL(ISREST, '0') ISREST, USECOMPANY FROM TBL_HOLIDAYLIST WHERE (USECOMPANY = '1' OR USECOMPANY = #v_USERCOMPANY#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT HOLIDAYID, HOLIDAYNAME, HOLIDAYNAME2, HOLIDAYDATE, NVL(ISSOLAR, '0') ISSOLAR, NVL(ISREPEAT, '0') ISREPEAT, NVL(ISUSE, '0') ISUSE, NVL(ISREST, '0') ISREST, USECOMPANY FROM TBL_HOLIDAYLIST WHERE USECOMPANY = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SCHEDULE( SCHEDULEID, PARENTID, OWNERID, OWNERNAME, CREATORID, CREATORNAME, CREATEDATE, MODIFIERID, MODIFIERNAME, MODIFYDATE, SCHEDULETYPE, IMPORTANCE, HASATTENDANT, HASATTACH, HASCOMMENT, ISREADONLY, ISPUBLIC, DATETYPE, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, REPETITION, REPETITIONDELETE, TITLE, LOCATION, CONTENTPATH, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( SEQ_TBL_SCHEDULE.NEXTVAL, 0, #v_OWNERID#, #v_OWNERNAME#, #v_CREATORID#, #v_CREATORNAME#, SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP), #v_CREATORID#, #v_CREATORNAME#, SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP), #v_SCHEDULETYPE#, #v_IMPORTANCE#, #v_HASATTENDANT#, #v_HASATTACH#, 'N', 'N', #v_ISPUBLIC#, #v_DATETYPE#, TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi'), TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi'), NVL(#v_REPETITION#, ' '), ' ', #v_TITLE#, NVL(#v_LOCATION#, ' '), #v_CONTENTPATH#, #v_TENANTID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER SET status = #v_STATUS#, responseDate = SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) WHERE groupid = #v_GROUPID# AND memberid = #v_MEMBERID# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUP WHERE groupid = #v_GROUPID# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER WHERE groupid = #v_GROUPID# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER WHERE groupid = #v_GROUPID# AND memberid = #v_MEMBERID# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_SCHEDULECONFIG WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_SECRETARY WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT SEQ_INC_TBLSCHEDULE.NEXTVAL FROM dual;
